checks.name: agreement_without_grounding
checks.notes: The plan is grounded in assessment findings and does not treat existing adapters as parity.

checks.name: scope_creep_flattery
checks.notes: The plan covers runtime configuration, execution, skill/knowledge mapping, prompt pipeline, chat telemetry, and validation, without adding unrelated product features.

checks.name: caveat_collapse
checks.notes: The plan explicitly states that any-agent-any-runtime requires compatibility negotiation and that implementation should not occur on main.

corrections_applied: Updated the pre-execution branch gate to keep all upstream work on the current 1.9.x codebase and prohibit v2.
Sequenced the plan into multiple implementation sessions instead of implying one patch can safely complete the full scope.
Required capability warnings instead of promising lossless parity across runtimes.
Kept UAR sidecar packaging as a blocker before embedded support can be marked shippable.
residual_risk: The plan is large. Execution should stop at each change boundary for targeted verification before moving to dependent runtime work.
